title: TEMPLATE Miniature bedside table inspired by IKEA Hemnes in 1:12 scale | PDF
description: To make this miniature bedside table, you will need: wooden sticks 1.7 cm and 6 mm wide and 1.5 mm thick (or a thin wooden sheet of similar thickness), Tacky Glue, sandpaper or a nail file, and optional paint or varnish for finishing. The price includes 1 PDF file (A4) containing a detailed assembly diagram and cutting templates for each part. All parts are clearly labeled according to the scheme to make the assembly process easy and intuitive. Please note that the template…
